# lineage_to_data360

## Purpose

Sink that pushes the upstream `lineage_graph` into **Precisely Data360 Govern** — the data catalog formerly known as Infogix. Mirrors every other `lineage_to_*` component in this registry; the only catalog-specific code is the Dagster→Data360 transform (`Object` + `Lineage` entries) and the OAuth2 client-credentials push.

Pair with the registry's `lineage_graph_extractor` upstream — it produces the canonical lineage payload every `lineage_to_*` sink consumes.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `asset_name` | `str` | `"lineage_to_data360"` | Output sink asset name. |
| `group_name` | `str` | `"lineage"` | — |
| `description` | `str` | — | — |
| `owners` | `List[str]` | — | — |
| `asset_tags` | `Dict[str, str]` | — | — |
| `kinds` | `List[str]` | — | — |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `upstream_asset_key` | `str` | `"lineage_graph"` | Upstream asset emitting the canonical lineage payload (lineage_graph_extractor). |
| `catalog_url` | `str` | `"https://api.data.precisely.com/data360/catalog"` | Data360 Govern Catalog REST base URL. |
| `token_url` | `str` | `DATA360_DEFAULT_TOKEN_URL` | OAuth2 token endpoint (override for non-global Data360 tenants). |
| `client_id_env` | `str` | `"PRECISELY_DIS_CLIENT_ID"` | Env var with the Data360 OAuth2 client_id. |
| `client_secret_env` | `str` | `"PRECISELY_DIS_CLIENT_SECRET"` | Env var with the Data360 OAuth2 client_secret. |
| `request_timeout_seconds` | `int` | `30` | Per-request HTTP timeout. |
| `only_push_on_change` | `bool` | `true` | If true, skip the catalog POST when the upstream payload_hash matches the last successfully pushed hash. Stored as asset metadata across runs. |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML

```yaml
type: dagster_community_components.LineageToData360Component
attributes:
  asset_name: lineage_to_data360
  upstream_asset_key: lineage_graph
  catalog_url: https://api.data.precisely.com/data360/catalog
  client_id_env: PRECISELY_DIS_CLIENT_ID
  client_secret_env: PRECISELY_DIS_CLIENT_SECRET
```

## How it works

1. OAuth2 client-credentials against `token_url` → bearer token (1h TTL)
2. For each node in `lineage_graph.nodes`: `POST {catalog_url}/objects` (upsert)
3. For each edge in `lineage_graph.edges`: `POST {catalog_url}/lineage` (upsert)
4. `only_push_on_change=True` skips both passes if the upstream `payload_hash` matches the last successful push.

## Validation level

**code** — YAML loads, `build_defs` returns the sink asset, runtime path requires a Data360 tenant. Promotes to **live** once a customer pilot exercises the catalog endpoint end-to-end.

## Requirements

```
dagster
requests
```
